title.rendered: Travel FX – Best Travel Money Retailer 2024?

content.rendered:
We’re absolutely thrilled to announce that Travel FX has once again been nominated for the esteemed British Travel Awards, marking our sixth consecutive nomination in the highly competitive category of Best Travel Money Retailer. This recognition is a testament to our ongoing dedication to market leading rates and excellent service.

The British Travel Awards hold a special place in the UK travel industry, often likened to the Oscars of our field. Merely securing a nomination is a noteworthy achievement, showcasing Travel FX’s unwavering commitment to travel money.

Competition in our category is fierce, pitting us against major high street players like the Post Office, who boast an extensive network of customers nationwide. Travel FX, despite being a smaller online business, we take pride in offering rates that are not just competitive but market leading, coupled with exceptional customer service.

Our stellar ratings on platforms like Trustpilot stand as a testament to our customer-centric focus. We firmly believe that our dedication to customer satisfaction sets us apart, and it’s a point of pride to be acknowledged for our efforts.

Come June 23rd, we’ll be sharing the voting link so you can have your say, and we’re eagerly anticipating the results. We extend our heartfelt gratitude to our loyal customers whose unwavering support has propelled us to this milestone.

By participating in the BTAs, you’ll also automatically enter into a prize draw featuring an array of fantastic travel and holiday prizes. Stay tuned for the prize list announcement. We will let you know as soon as we hear!   We extend our sincere thanks to our customers for their continued support, and we’re committed to delivering nothing but the best in service and pricing. So please, cast your vote and help us clinch the award this year!

itemListElement.name: Travel FX – Best Travel Money Retailer 2024?

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
